measurement_note: Size is q, the number of method calls. Each tier completes N one-unit trips on the same route and then queries that route N times, so q = 3N. The 60/240/960-call tiers span 16x within the legal limit. The reference updates and reads a total/count pair in O(q) total time; a correct implementation that stores all durations and re-sums them for every query takes O(N^2) time and completes normally.
